title: Record 10 Billion Downloads: MIIT Releases OpenHarmony Mid-Year Report, Devices Exceed 1.35 Billion
excerpt: A half-year report from a State Council Information Office press conference directly measured the weight of China's open-source ecosystem. At 10:00 a.m. on July
content_html:
A half-year report from a State Council Information Office press conference directly measured the weight of China's open-source ecosystem. At 10:00 a.m. on July 20, the State Council Information Office held a press conference, with Wang Weiming, chief engineer of the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, Tao Qing, director of the Department of Operation Monitoring and Coordination, and Xie Cun, director of the Bureau of Information and Communications, attending together to introduce the development situation of industry and information technology in the first half of 2026 and answer journalists' questions. At this press conference, a set of figures given by Tao Qing allowed the outside world to clearly see the realistic outline of the simultaneous efforts of basic software, industrial software, and the open-source ecosystem.

First, there is a stable foundation. From January to May this year, China's software business income exceeded 6.2 trillion yuan, an increase of 10.3% year-on-year, continuing the trend of steady growth. Under this foundation, the software industry has shown four clear development trends this year.

The first trend is the accelerated development of basic software. Basic software such as operating systems and databases continues to break through, with a series of innovative achievements emerging one after another. The open-source HarmonyOS operating system has fully covered terminal devices such as smartphones, computers, cars, and home appliances, with more than 1.35 billion ecological devices. Over 100 industry distribution versions based on the open-source HarmonyOS, such as E-Hong and Yi-Hong, have been launched. A domestic open-source system that once started from scratch has now quietly grown into the body of hundreds of millions of devices.

The second trend is the widespread application of industrial software. Industrial software has formed a product system covering key industries, accelerating deployment and continuous iteration in critical areas, providing power for the digital transformation of various industries. By the end of June this year, the penetration rate of digital R&D design tools in key industrial enterprises reached 86.3%, and the numerical control rate of key processes reached 69.5%. Both rates have stood at high levels simultaneously.

The third trend is the comprehensive empowerment of artificial intelligence. Authorities have guided software companies to seize the opportunities brought by AI industrial transformation, accelerate the use of code large models and intelligent programming tools to improve R&D and production efficiency, making product functions richer, interaction experiences more natural, and content creation more efficient. Innovative applications such as intelligent testing and intelligent operations are also accelerating their implementation.

The fourth trend, which is also the most significant point of this press conference — the rapid expansion of the open-source ecosystem. National-level open-source foundations have already included more than 50 open-source projects in the incubation stage. The national-level artificial intelligence open-source community has gathered over 11 million users and hosted more than 70,000 models. Open-source solutions covering the entire stack, from basic software to large models and applications, are accelerating their construction. Most notably, the global cumulative downloads of China's artificial intelligence open-source large models have exceeded 10 billion times. From lines of open-source code to billions of times being pulled by global developers, the influence of China's large models has been placed on the table in such a concrete way for the first time.

content_html_zh:
国务院新闻办公室半年报直接测算了中国开源生态的权重。 上午 10:00 7月20日，国务院新闻办召开新闻发布会，工业和信息化部总工程师王伟明、运行监测协调司司长陶庆、信息通信局局长谢存共同出席，介绍2026年上半年工业和信息化发展情况并回答记者提问。 本次发布会上，陶庆给出的一组数字让外界看清了基础软件、工业软件、开源生态同步发力的现实轮廓。

首先，有稳定的基础。 今年1-5月，我国软件业务收入突破6.2万亿元，同比增长10.3%，延续稳定增长态势。 在此基础上，今年软件产业呈现出四个明显的发展趋势。

第一个趋势是基础软件的加速发展。 操作系统、数据库等基础软件不断突破，一系列创新成果相继涌现。 开源HarmonyOS操作系统已全面覆盖智能手机、电脑、汽车、家电等终端设备，生态设备超过13.5亿台。 基于开源鸿蒙操作系统，已推出亿鸿、易鸿等100多个行业发行版本。 一个曾经白手起家的国产开源系统，如今已经悄然成长为亿万设备的躯体。

第二个趋势是工业软件的广泛应用。 工业软件已形成覆盖重点行业的产品体系，在关键领域加速部署和持续迭代，为各行业数字化转型提供动力。 截至今年6月底，重点工业企业数字化研发设计工具普及率达到86.3%，关键工序数控化率达到69.5%。 两个利率同时处于高位。

第三个趋势是人工智能的全面赋能。 引导软件企业抓住人工智能产业变革带来的机遇，加快使用代码大模型和智能编程工具，提高研发和生产效率，让产品功能更加丰富、交互体验更加自然、内容创作更加高效。 智能检测、智能运营等创新应用也在加速落地。

第四个趋势，也是本次发布会最显着的一点——开源生态的快速扩张。 国家级开​​源基金会已经有50多个处于孵化阶段的开源项目。 国家级人工智能开源社区已聚集超过1100万用户，托管超过7万个模型。 从基础软件到大型模型和应用，涵盖全栈的开源解决方案正在加速建设。 最值得注意的是，中国人工智能开源大模型全球累计下载量已超过100亿次。 从一行行开源代码到被全球开发者拉动数十亿次，中国大型模型的影响力第一次以如此具体的方式摆在桌面上。
